articles.title: Emerging Assets Post Positive Week as Hopes for Peace Deal Grow
articles.summary: Emerging-market stocks and currencies gained on the week as investors grew increasingly hopeful that the US and Iran are moving closer to a peace deal.

articles.title: S&P 500 Posts Eighth Weekly Gain as AI Stocks Power Rally
articles.summary: US stocks advanced, notching gains ahead of a long holiday weekend fueled by hopes for resolution of hostilities in the Middle East and relentless enthusiasm for artificial intelligence-linked trades.

articles.title: Dollar Stalls as US-Iran Peace Hopes Boost Risk Sentiment
articles.summary: The dollar ended the week nearly unchanged as risk assets got a boost tied to optimism around progress in peace talks between the US and Iran.

articles.title: S&P 500 Bulls Power Longest Weekly Gain Since 2023: Markets Wrap
articles.summary: Hopes for a deal between the US and Iran that will turn a fragile ceasefire into lasting peace fueled Wall Street optimism, driving stocks to their longest streak of weekly gains since 2023.

articles.title: Gold Drops as Fed’s Waller Says Next Move Likely To Be Rate Hike
articles.summary: Gold declined as traders ramped up bets on Federal Reserve monetary tightening after Governor Christopher Waller warned the Iran war’s energy shock could fuel inflation.
